# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-flask-app
  labels:
    app: python-flask
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: python-flask
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: python-flask
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: flask-app
          image: your-docker-repo/python-flask:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5000
          env:
            - name: ENV
              value: "production"
